meaning: adj.最远的,最遥远的adv.最远地,最大程度地,最大限度地
examples: They had a competition to see who could throw the furthest.
The risk of thunder is greatest in those areas furthest from the coast.
The south, where prices have fallen furthest, will remain the weakest market.
Ultimately, the furthest our bullet goes should be about 30, 000 times its own length.
Nevada's Yucca Mountain is the "furthest along and most advanced" high-level nuclear waste repository, Cheney said.
